# Stop — do not file a public security issue.

If you have discovered a vulnerability in ehrbase-ui, please **do not**
open a public GitHub issue.

Disclose privately via the channel documented in
[`docs/governance/SECURITY.md`](../../docs/governance/SECURITY.md)
(landing alongside the rest of the Foundation milestone — until then,
email the maintainer directly).

Public filing of an unpatched vulnerability in clinical software puts
real patient data at risk.

Thanks for taking the time to report responsibly.
